title: $1,500 in first 24 hours from first launch
body: After 6 months of zero income, first product launch hit $1,500 in the first day.

title: $41,202 month by February 2024
body: Scaled from first launch to consistent 5-figure months within 5 months.

title: $52,503 month in March 2024
body: Peak monthly revenue from digital products, no team or complex funnels.

title: $320,080 first year on YouTube
body: Total revenue generated in the first year of YouTube as primary sales channel.

title: $349,316+ total digital product sales to date
body: Cumulative digital product revenue as a solo operator with no team.

title: $20K/month on autopilot from 5 evergreen videos
body: Five YouTube videos posted once continued generating $20K/month passively.

title: $10K/month web design business built via TikTok in 2020
body: Built a service business to $10K/month using organic short-form content with no outbound sales.

title: 663 reviews at 5.0 stars on Creative Business Blueprint
body: Free lead magnet became the biggest free product with 663 five-star reviews on Gumroad.

title: 72 reviews at 5.0 stars on Web Design Workflow ($149)
body: Main passive revenue driver product maintained a perfect rating across 72 reviews.

title: Zero to $41K months in under 12 months after pivot
body: After quitting client work in March 2023 and earning nothing for 6 months, scaled to $41K months by February 2024.
